sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, a UInt32, b UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, a, b) VALUES (1, 1, 0), (2, 0, 1), (3, 0, 0);
SELECT id, a OR b AS result FROM test_table WHERE result = 1;
UPDATE test_table SET b = 1 WHERE a = 0;
SELECT id, a, b, a OR b AS logical_disjunction FROM test_table;
